transcript: Speaker A: If you understand English but can't speak – this is for you! Movies, YouTube, podcasts sab samajh lete ho. Lekin jab bolne ka time aata hai — aap freeze ho jaate ho. Yeh aapki galti nahi hai. Bas aapne kabhi sahi method use hi nahi kiya! MySivi App ke saath aap live conversations practice karte ho AI tutors ke saath, jo aapko bolte waqt hi instantly correct karte hain. You don't just listen, you talk, get feedback, and improve immediately. No more translating in your head. No more freezing. Bas 15 minutes roz — aur real progress. Sirf ek hafte mein aap results dekh loge! Trust me! Toh agar aap ready ho, click karo. Let's get started! [If you understand English but can't speak – this is for you! You understand movies, YouTube, podcasts. But when it's time to speak — you freeze. This is not your fault. You just haven't used the right method! With MySivi App, you practice live conversations with AI tutors, who correct you instantly while speaking. You don't just listen, you talk, get feedback, and improve immediately. No more translating in your head. No more freezing. Just 15 minutes a day — and real progress. You will see results in just one week! Trust me! So if you are ready, click. Let's get started!]

Lekin jab bolne ka time aata hai — aap freeze ho jaate ho. Yeh aapki galti nahi hai. Bas aapne kabhi sahi method use hi nahi kiya! You don't just listen, you talk, get feedback, and improve immediately. No more translating in your head. No more freezing. Bas 15 minutes roz — aur real progress. Sirf ek hafte mein aap results dekh loge! Trust me! Toh agar aap ready ho, click karo. Let's get started! [Fluent in English in 30 days. If you understand English but can't speak – this is for you! You understand movies, YouTube, podcasts. But when it's time to speak — you freeze. This is not your fault. You just haven't used the right method! With MySivi App, you practice live conversations with AI tutors, who correct you instantly while speaking. You don't just listen, you talk, get feedback, and improve immediately. No more translating in your head. No more freezing. Just 15 minutes a day — and real progress. You will see results in just one week! Trust me! So if you are ready, click. Let's get started!]
summary: The ad targets individuals who understand English but struggle to speak it. It promotes the MySivi App, which uses AI tutors for real-time conversation practice and instant feedback. The call to action encourages users to download the app and practice 15 minutes daily.
